title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Columbia Asia

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Columbia Asia
jsonLd.description:
We at Columbia Asia are looking for an experienced Medical Officer based out of Gurgaon. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Columbia Asia:
Columbia Asia is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Columbia Asia!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
